proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with feature_009 == 1 have more negative dependency_BRAF scores than cell lines with feature_009 == 0.
Cell lines with feature_022 == 1 have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than cell lines with feature_022 == 0.
Cell lines with feature_024 == 1 have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than cell lines with feature_024 == 0.
Cell lines with feature_014 == 1 have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than cell lines with feature_014 == 0.
Cell lines with feature_027 == 1 have more negative dependency_RIT1 scores than cell lines with feature_027 == 0.

analyses.result_summary: Welch comparison: feature_009 == 1 mean dependency_BRAF -0.8047 vs -0.2495 for feature_009 == 0; effect -0.5552.
Welch comparison: feature_022 == 1 mean dependency_EGFR -0.6010 vs -0.2524 for feature_022 == 0; effect -0.3486.
Welch comparison: feature_024 == 1 mean dependency_ERBB2 -0.6856 vs -0.2535 for feature_024 == 0; effect -0.4321.
Welch comparison: feature_014 == 1 mean dependency_KRAS -0.5594 vs -0.2520 for feature_014 == 0; effect -0.3075.
Welch comparison: feature_027 == 1 mean dependency_RIT1 -0.3527 vs -0.2572 for feature_027 == 0; effect -0.0955.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Skin lineage cell lines (feature_011 == "skin") have more negative dependency_BRAF scores than non-skin cell lines.
Brain lineage cell lines (feature_011 == "brain") have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than non-brain cell lines.
Breast lineage cell lines (feature_011 == "breast") have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than non-breast cell lines.
Luminal subtype cell lines (feature_010 == "luminal") have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than non-luminal cell lines.
Pancreatic lineage cell lines (feature_011 == "pancreatic") have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than non-pancreatic cell lines.
Colorectal lineage cell lines (feature_011 == "colorectal") have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than non-colorectal cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: feature_011 == skin mean dependency_BRAF -0.4721 vs -0.2938 in other lineages; effect -0.1783.
feature_011 == brain mean dependency_EGFR -0.3307 vs -0.2755 in other lineages; effect -0.0552.
feature_011 == breast mean dependency_ERBB2 -0.3208 vs -0.2916 in other lineages; effect -0.0292.
feature_010 == luminal mean dependency_ERBB2 -0.3234 vs -0.2934 in other subtypes; effect -0.0300.
feature_011 == pancreatic mean dependency_KRAS -0.4260 vs -0.3133 in other lineages; effect -0.1127.
feature_011 == colorectal mean dependency_KRAS -0.3689 vs -0.3190 in other lineages; effect -0.0500.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Colorectal lineage cell lines (feature_011 == "colorectal") have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with feature_035 == 1 have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than cell lines with feature_035 == 0.
Cell lines with high feature_028 (feature_028 >= 0.819) have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than cell lines with feature_028 < 0.819.

analyses.result_summary: feature_011 == colorectal mean dependency_KIF18A -0.7204 vs -0.2524 in other lineages; effect -0.4680.
feature_035 == 1 mean dependency_KIF18A -0.5447 vs -0.2526 for feature_035 == 0; effect -0.2921.
feature_028 >= 0.819 mean dependency_KIF18A -0.4694 vs -0.2526 below threshold; effect -0.2168.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest dependency_KIF18A subgroup is cell lines with feature_011 == "colorectal", feature_035 == 1, and feature_028 >= 0.819; this subgroup has more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than all other cell lines.
The colorectal dependency_KIF18A effect is enabled by feature_035 == 1: the feature_011 == "colorectal" by feature_035 == 1 interaction is negative.
The colorectal dependency_KIF18A effect is enabled by high feature_028: the feature_011 == "colorectal" by feature_028 >= 0.819 interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Three-predicate subgroup test: feature_011 == colorectal AND feature_035 == 1 AND feature_028 >= 0.819 had n=3133, mean dependency_KIF18A -1.1119 vs -0.2530 in all other cell lines; effect -0.8589.
Two-way interaction screen: colorectal/feature_035 cells had means -0.9425, -0.2592, -0.2534, -0.2523 across the 2x2 table; interaction contrast -0.6822.
Two-way interaction screen: colorectal/high-feature_028 cells had means -0.9288, -0.2590, -0.2529, -0.2523 across the 2x2 table; interaction contrast -0.6691.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within colorectal cell lines, absence of feature_035 suppresses the dependency_KIF18A signal: feature_011 == "colorectal" AND feature_035 == 0 is less negative than the rest of the dataset.
Outside colorectal lineage, feature_035 == 1 does not define dependency_KIF18A sensitivity: feature_011 != "colorectal" AND feature_035 == 1 is less negative than the rest of the dataset.
Within the complete KIF18A subgroup, very high feature_028 (feature_028 >= 1.260) further amplifies dependency_KIF18A negativity.

analyses.result_summary: feature_011 == colorectal AND feature_035 == 0 had n=1891, mean dependency_KIF18A -0.2592 vs -0.3087 in all other cells; effect +0.0495, opposite to a dependency-enriched subgroup.

feature_011 != colorectal AND feature_035 == 1 had n=5360, mean dependency_KIF18A -0.2534 vs -0.3132 in all other cells; effect +0.0599, indicating feature_035 alone is not sufficient outside colorectal lineage.
feature_011 == colorectal AND feature_035 == 1 AND feature_028 >= 1.260 had n=2407, mean dependency_KIF18A -1.1947 vs -0.2619 in all other cells; effect -0.9328.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high feature_016 (feature_016 >= 0.964) have more negative dependency_POLR2A scores than cell lines with feature_016 < 0.964.
Cell lines with high feature_016 (feature_016 >= 0.964) have more negative dependency_TMED10 scores than cell lines with feature_016 < 0.964.
Cell lines with high feature_016 (feature_016 >= 0.964) have more negative dependency_DHX9 scores than cell lines with feature_016 < 0.964.
Cell lines with high feature_016 (feature_016 >= 0.964) have more negative dependency_RPL11 scores than cell lines with feature_016 < 0.964.

analyses.result_summary: feature_016 >= 0.964 mean dependency_POLR2A -0.4972 vs -0.3928 below threshold; effect -0.1043.
feature_016 >= 0.964 mean dependency_TMED10 -0.2816 vs -0.2447 below threshold; effect -0.0369.
feature_016 >= 0.964 mean dependency_DHX9 -0.3614 vs -0.3243 below threshold; effect -0.0371.
feature_016 >= 0.964 mean dependency_RPL11 -0.3012 vs -0.2594 below threshold; effect -0.0418.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high feature_003 (feature_003 >= 1.003) have more negative dependency_RPL11 scores than cell lines with feature_003 < 1.003.
Cell lines with feature_018 == 1 have more negative dependency_RPL11 scores than cell lines with feature_018 == 0.
Cell lines with both high feature_016 (feature_016 >= 1.088) and high feature_003 (feature_003 >= 1.003) have especially negative dependency_RPL11 scores.

analyses.result_summary: feature_003 >= 1.003 mean dependency_RPL11 -0.3831 vs -0.2573 below threshold; effect -0.1257.
feature_018 == 1 mean dependency_RPL11 -0.3614 vs -0.2523 for feature_018 == 0; effect -0.1091.
Subgroup screen: feature_016 >= 1.088 AND feature_003 >= 1.003 had n=717, mean dependency_RPL11 -0.4193 vs -0.2677 in all other cells; effect -0.1515.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For dependency_BRAF, systematic two-predicate subgroup screening does not find a stronger dependency subgroup than the feature_009 == 1 main subgroup.
For dependency_EGFR, systematic two-predicate subgroup screening retains feature_022 == 1 as the primary dependency subgroup, with only small amplification by high feature_016.
For dependency_ERBB2, systematic two-predicate subgroup screening retains feature_024 == 1 as the primary dependency subgroup without a stronger additional modifier.
For dependency_KRAS, systematic two-predicate subgroup screening retains feature_014 == 1 as the primary dependency subgroup without a stronger additional modifier.
For dependency_RIT1, feature_027 == 1 remains the primary subgroup, with a modestly stronger brain-lineage subgroup.

analyses.result_summary: Across all two-predicate rules for dependency_BRAF, the top negative rule was feature_009 == 1 AND feature_030 == 0 with mean -0.8055 vs -0.2540; effect -0.5514, essentially the same as the feature_009 main effect -0.5552.

Across all two-predicate rules for dependency_EGFR, the top negative rule was feature_016 >= 1.088 AND feature_022 == 1 with n=393, mean -0.6474 vs -0.2765; effect -0.3709, only modestly larger than the feature_022 main effect -0.3486.
Across all two-predicate rules for dependency_ERBB2, feature_022 == 0 AND feature_024 == 1 had n=4533, mean -0.6855 vs -0.2569; effect -0.4286, matching the feature_024 main effect -0.4321.

Across all two-predicate rules for dependency_KRAS, feature_010 == her2_enriched AND feature_014 == 1 had n=134, mean -0.6338 vs -0.3239; effect -0.3099, comparable to the feature_014 main effect -0.3075.

Across all two-predicate rules for dependency_RIT1, feature_011 == brain AND feature_027 == 1 had n=329, mean -0.4047 vs -0.2650; effect -0.1397, a modest refinement of the feature_027 main effect -0.0955.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For dependency_TMED10, systematic subgroup screening finds the most negative subgroup among cell lines with feature_016 >= 1.088 and feature_026 >= 1.153.
For dependency_DHX9, systematic subgroup screening finds the most negative subgroup among cell lines with feature_016 >= 1.088 and feature_023 >= 6.330.
For dependency_POLR2A, systematic subgroup screening finds a more negative subgroup among cell lines with feature_016 >= 1.088 and feature_015 <= 2.083.
For dependency_RPL11, systematic subgroup screening finds a more negative subgroup among cell lines with feature_016 >= 1.088 and feature_018 == 1.

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup screen: feature_026 >= 1.153 AND feature_016 >= 1.088 had n=490, mean dependency_TMED10 -0.3424 vs -0.2531 in all other cells; effect -0.0893.
Subgroup screen: feature_016 >= 1.088 AND feature_023 >= 6.330 had n=571, mean dependency_DHX9 -0.4174 vs -0.3327 in all other cells; effect -0.0847.
Subgroup screen: feature_016 >= 1.088 AND feature_015 <= 2.083 had n=513, mean dependency_POLR2A -0.5565 vs -0.4177 in all other cells; effect -0.1389.
Subgroup screen: feature_016 >= 1.088 AND feature_018 == 1 had n=1113, mean dependency_RPL11 -0.3991 vs -0.2670 in all other cells; effect -0.1322.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final dependency_BRAF subgroup: feature_009 == 1 is the dominant more-negative dependency_BRAF subgroup; skin lineage is a secondary weaker modifier.
Final dependency_EGFR subgroup: feature_022 == 1 is the dominant more-negative dependency_EGFR subgroup; brain lineage is a secondary weaker modifier.
Final dependency_ERBB2 subgroup: feature_024 == 1 is the dominant more-negative dependency_ERBB2 subgroup; breast and luminal annotations are secondary weaker modifiers.
Final dependency_KRAS subgroup: feature_014 == 1 is the dominant more-negative dependency_KRAS subgroup; pancreatic and colorectal lineages are secondary weaker modifiers.
Final dependency_RIT1 subgroup: feature_027 == 1 is the dominant more-negative dependency_RIT1 subgroup, with strongest observed refinement in brain lineage.
Final dependency_KIF18A subgroup: feature_011 == "colorectal" AND feature_035 == 1 AND feature_028 >= 0.819 defines the complete strong more-negative dependency_KIF18A subgroup.
Final dependency_TMED10 subgroup: high feature_016 marks a weak more-negative dependency_TMED10 pattern, amplified by high feature_026.
Final dependency_DHX9 subgroup: high feature_016 marks a weak more-negative dependency_DHX9 pattern, amplified by high feature_023.
Final dependency_POLR2A subgroup: high feature_016 is the dominant more-negative dependency_POLR2A pattern.
Final dependency_RPL11 subgroup: high feature_003 and feature_018 == 1 are the dominant more-negative dependency_RPL11 patterns, with additional enrichment at high feature_016.

analyses.result_summary: Final synthesis used the h1 feature_009 effect -0.5552 and h6 skin effect -0.1783; no two-predicate screen exceeded the feature_009 main effect.
Final synthesis used the h2 feature_022 effect -0.3486 and h7 brain effect -0.0552; two-predicate screening found only modest amplification.
Final synthesis used the h3 feature_024 effect -0.4321 plus smaller breast/luminal effects of -0.0292 and -0.0300.
Final synthesis used the h4 feature_014 effect -0.3075 plus pancreatic and colorectal lineage effects of -0.1127 and -0.0500.
Final synthesis used the h5 feature_027 effect -0.0955 and the brain/feature_027 subgroup effect -0.1397.
Final synthesis used the complete KIF18A subgroup effect -0.8589 and its negative pairwise interaction contrasts with feature_035 and feature_028.
Final synthesis used the feature_016 >= 0.964 TMED10 effect -0.0369 and the high-feature_016/high-feature_026 subgroup effect -0.0893.
Final synthesis used the feature_016 >= 0.964 DHX9 effect -0.0371 and the high-feature_016/high-feature_023 subgroup effect -0.0847.
Final synthesis used the feature_016 >= 0.964 POLR2A effect -0.1043 and the high-feature_016/high-feature_015-low subgroup effect -0.1389.
Final synthesis used the feature_003 >= 1.003 RPL11 effect -0.1257, feature_018 == 1 effect -0.1091, and high-feature_016/high-feature_003 subgroup effect -0.1515.
